tagline.en: Red peppers from your own garden!
tagline.da: Roede peberfrugter fra din egen have!

theme.hero_task: Pick the reddest pepper and eat it fresh

tasks.action: Harvest ripe red peppers from Bed C

prompt.en: Twist the pepper gently to pick it -- bite into it like an apple!
prompt.da: Vrid peberfrugten forsigtigt for at plukke den -- bid i den som et aeble!

prompt.en: Tomatoes, cucumbers, raspberries, kale, beans -- check them all!
prompt.da: Tomater, agurker, hindbaer, groenkal, boenner -- tjek dem alle!

prompt.en: Even as days get shorter, keep watering!
prompt.da: Selv naar dagene bliver kortere, bliv ved med at vande!

tasks.action: Remove spent pea plants from Bed C first trellis position

prompt.en: The first peas are done -- pull out the brown vines and put them in compost.
prompt.da: De foerste aerter er faerdige -- traek de brune ranker ud og laeg dem i kompost.

prompt.en: Last lettuce cuttings before it gets too hot for lettuce.
prompt.da: Sidste salatklipninger foer det bliver for varmt til salat.

prompt.en: The peppers went from green to red -- taste the difference! Red is much sweeter!
prompt.da: Peberfrugternes skiftede fra groen til roed -- smag forskellen! Roed er meget soedere!

growth_events.event: Kale continuing strong harvest -- lower leaves keep producing

prompt.en: The kale just keeps growing! Pick from the bottom and it makes more at the top.
prompt.da: Groenkaalen bliver bare ved med at gro! Pluk fra bunden og den laver mere i toppen.
